case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. RUMEKA L MCGLOTHIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGLOTHIN, RUMEKA L $2,201.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,201.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $22.31 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MCGLOTHIN, RUMEKA L
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED AUG-06-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCGLOTHIN, RUMEKA L

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2013 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-23-2013 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSALBA FARRELL--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. A COPY OF THE CONTRACT MARKED JUDGE'S COPY IS KEPT BY PRO TEM JUDGE ELAN C. LAMBERT FOR REVIEW ON THE DAY OF THE HEARING. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-18-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARGUERITE HALLIGAN-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
